commit_scope: Add Form-native text summarizer learning and LLM feature channel floor tracking so cells and recipes can discover summary/generation/retrieval/tool/code/speech/vision feature lanes as native rows with explicit floor and north-star state.

commands: coord claim "Form-native text summarizer learning and LLM feature channel floor"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/text-summary-learning-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/tests/llm-feature-channel-floor-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed on branch codex/text-summary-llm-feature-floor-20260614; wellness reported no required repair. text-summary-learning returned verdict 262143 and validate.sh printed fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables). llm-feature-channel-floor returned verdict 131071 and validate.sh printed fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way. The summary proof covers native learning samples for source docs, proof logs, runtime events, and dialogue; quality gates for citation, contradiction, coverage, metadata trust, compression, factuality, confidence, sovereignty, and aliveness; CHOICE-RECEIPT token-cost preservation; receipt-to-sample learning; explicit source-grounding and local LLM oracle requests; a low-token Form-native summary winner; and kernel:call request planning. The LLM feature proof covers twenty-three queryable feature rows with input/output codecs, grammar, carrier, receipt, metric floor, teacher, floor, and north-star text; native plans for summarize/tool-select/tool-execute/code-lower; no-plan refusal for unknown features; summary gate composition; source-grounding remote membrane; local LLM summarize oracle; stricter distill-retire floor; memory-update store+kernel carrier; abstain/uncertainty as a first-class channel; and speech/vision/multimodal rows.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet; CI not run at evidence creation time.

deploy_validation.summary: Local Form proof and docs only. No public deploy was performed at evidence creation time.

phase_gate.gate: Cells and recipes must see LLM-like capabilities as explicit native channel rows with floor/north-star state, not as ambient model calls.
phase_gate.next: Attach real heldout receipts: native source-reader summaries, real substrate retrieval receipts, real code/tool execution receipts, natural-language-to-Form/BML-to-ASM lowering samples, and audio/video channel samples through the same catalog rows.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form now has a four-way-proven summarizer learning lane and a four-way-proven LLM feature channel catalog that make summary, retrieval, generation, tool, code, speech, vision, memory, abstention, and distillation surfaces discoverable and plannable as native rows.
test_flows: A good source-doc summary passes and no-citation, contradiction, low-coverage, and low-trust summaries refuse.
Summary intent learning classifies source-doc, proof-log, runtime-event, and dialogue samples.
A summary CHOICE-RECEIPT preserves token cost and becomes a native training sample.
The Form-native summary candidate wins over local/remote/human teachers only after clearing quality and metadata gates with lower token/energy/nutrition cost.
Twenty-three LLM-like feature channels are queryable rows with floor and north-star text.
Known feature requests return native plans; unknown feature requests return explicit no-plan.
Summarize planning composes the summary quality gate before routing.
Cite-ground, summarize, code-lower, and tool-execute map to explicit oracle evidence kinds.
e2e_validation.summary: This adds the floor and north-star tracking surface. It does not claim every LLM feature is physically sampled yet; the docs name the next physical proof gaps for retrieval, generation, tool execution, code lowering, speech/vision, and distill-retire.
